title: Korbond Fabric Repair Tape/Patch - Iron On - Pack Of 3 – Black, White & Grey – Each 3.8cm x 50cm – Total 1.5m Tape – Invisible Permanent Mending - Ideal for Fixing Clothes & Garments
features: PACK CONTAINS: 50cm fusible mender white, 50cm fusible mender black, 50cm fusible mender grey

INSTANT REPAIR: Perform instant and permanent repairs on your favourite garments without the need to touch a sewing needle or thread. Alternatively, reinforce seams, repair frays, cover holes and create designs

EASY TO USE: heat activated adhesive – We recommend following the instructions carefully prior to application. Apply to required area, heat with iron set to a high heat and low steam setting and apply for 30 seconds. Repeat if necessary
MACHINE WASHABLE: Machine washable at 30 degrees to keep up with daily life, lasting multiple washes
Always test on inconspicuous area first
description: From the manufacturer Available now More products from Korbond care and repair Retractable Tape Measure Knee and Elbow Patches Extra Wide Iron On Mender Instant Repair Tape Korbond Care and Repair Iron On Mender Black, White and Grey 3.8 x 50 cm Korbond Iron On Mender 3 pack offers quick, permanent repair solutions to tears, holes and frayed fabrics. It is simple and easy to use, requiring moderate heat activation and makes mending a range of garments effortless. Once adhered to the fabric the iron on mender will withstand being laundered multiple times. Provided in 3 popular colours for common fabric matching. Contents Include: 50 cm fusible mender- white 50 cm fusible mender- black 50 cm fusible mender- Grey Handy Usages For Korbond Care and Repair Iron On Mender Mend and repair Discreet and long lasting, Iron on Mender is a quick and easy ‘sew free’ solution for mending holes, tears and frays on iron able fabric. Around the home A household essential for the sewing adverse. Suitable for medium and heavyweight materials. A ‘sew free’ alternative for small repairs on curtains, duvet covers, sheets, pillow cases and other fabric household accessories. School uniform maintenance With Iron on Mender, scuffs and tears from the rough and tumble of the playground can quickly and easy be repaired to prolong the life of clothes. Upcycling With three neutral shades in each pack, add a touch of personality to a plain piece of clothing or fabric by using Iron on Mender to create a pattern or shapes.
